TextWrapper
wrap

shortenz
d!d"
d#d$
[\w!"\'&.,?]z
[^\d\W]z
[%s]z
        ( # any whitespace
          %(ws)s+
        | # em-dash between words
          (?<=%(wp)s) -{2,} (?=\w)
        | # word, possibly hyphenated
          %(nws)s+? (?:
            # hyphenated word
              -(?: (?<=%(lt)s{2}-) | (?<=%(lt)s-%(lt)s-))
              (?= %(lt)s -? %(lt)s)
            | # end of word
              (?=%(ws)s|\Z)
            | # em-dash
              (?<=%(wp)s) (?=-{2,}\w)
            )
        ))
nwsz
(%s+)z
[a-z][\.\!\?][\"\']?\Z
 [...])
